layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A for Marketing, Mode B for Dashboard)

buttons.primary: bg-[#d7b340] text-black font-bold hover:bg-[#f5cc4a] rounded-none uppercase tracking-wider transition-all duration-200 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(215,179,64,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#60869a] text-[#60869a] hover:bg-[#60869a] hover:text-white rounded-none uppercase tracking-wider transition-all duration-200

cards.product: bg-[#121214] border border-white/5 hover:border-[#d7b340]/50 transition-colors duration-300 group relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-black/40 border-zinc-800 focus:border-[#d7b340] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#d7b340] text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

instructions_to_main_agent: Add 'Cinzel Decorative', 'Space Grotesk', and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in index.css.
Implement a 'Price Ticker' marquee at the top of the page using 'react-fast-marquee'.
The Hero section MUST use a parallax effect or a slow zoom on the background image.
Gold Packages must use the 'Gold Glow' visual enhancer on hover.
Ensure the 'Cart' is accessible via a floating action button or sticky header.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.design_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Do not make it look like a generic Bootstrap site.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.spacing: Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for section padding. Don't be afraid of empty space.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.contrast: Always tint greys with blue (cool) or orange (warm). Never pure grey.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.interactivity: All buttons must have a hover state. All cards must lift on hover.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.accessibility: Ensure text contrast meets APCA standards. Use aria-labels for icon buttons.
